summary: Return a clear error from refreshAccessToken instead of silently no-oping when the token is expired.
reason: greatclips mints tokens via the auth0silent /authorize flow, not OAuth2 refresh_token exchange, so tokenURL was hardcoded to '' and the function returned nil. Callers got a silent no-op and the next API call produced an opaque 401. The function now returns an explicit error telling the user to re-run `greatclips auth login` (greptile P1).
